description: Marat's operator-only cockpit deploy. Contains the 6 operator-owned workspaces (mbp-private, xcp-platform, xlooop, x-biz, x-docs, x-front). Customer-prospect workspaces (aps-pty-ltd, aps-access-property-services) are STRIPPED at build time per tenant_filter rules below.

data_files.rationale: Workspace switcher · operator tenant must NOT show customer-prospect cards
Workspace operational detail · per-workspace keys; remove customer entries
Per-workspace project list · scope to operator workspaces only
Workspace tree navigation · operator-side only
Operations dashboard rollup · customer rows removed from workspace_counts
Setup-blueprint catalog · operator-side workspaces only
Source-map projection · operator tenant scope
Role-route projection · operator routes only
Project data · drop projects whose workspaceId matches customer tenants
Server-side per-tenant policy · operator tenant entries only
Customer-safe export manifest · operator copy excludes APS customer
Customer-health value read-model · operator copy excludes APS customer (moved to APS tenant deploy)
Customer-onboarding read-model · operator copy excludes APS customer
Already operator-only after R50-Tail-7 cleanup (Marat-only)
Assisted-mode v1 ground-truth registry · global UI metadata, no per-tenant rows (verified 0 APS refs) · the hover-help overlay fetches it at /data/

Operator activity feed · the cockpit data-projection-reader fetches /data/operations-live-stream.json to compute freshness (_meta.valid_until). Was EXCLUDED from the projection → 404 → SPA-fallback HTML → reader defaulted to degraded·stale (U3, 2026-06-02). Defensive strip_workspaces keeps it APS-clean (verified 0 APS refs today; 55 rows all operator/MB-P/Xlooop scope).

Generic nav UI config (wsPanes + projectModes), no tenant data. DataLoader reads it into window.WS_PANES/PROJECT_MODES; was EXCLUDED from the projection → /data/nav-config.json fell through to SPA-fallback HTML → JSON.parse fail → undefined globals → authenticated-render crash (guarded in App.jsx #680, but the live nav config was degraded).

Agent capability projection read-model (operator scope, 0 customer refs) — was undeployed -> /data served SPA HTML -> DataLoader fail-soft null -> degraded read-model. 0 customer refs; boundary gate validates.
Durable proposal receipts read-model (operator scope) — was undeployed -> /data served SPA HTML -> DataLoader fail-soft null -> degraded read-model. 0 customer refs; boundary gate validates.

Governed proposal ledger (DataLoader reads this .example path directly, not as a fallback) — was undeployed -> /data served SPA HTML -> DataLoader fail-soft null -> degraded read-model. 0 customer refs; boundary gate validates.
Graph context slice read-model (operator scope) — was undeployed -> /data served SPA HTML -> DataLoader fail-soft null -> degraded read-model. 0 customer refs; boundary gate validates.

Initial store seed (operator workspaces/domains; API hydrators overlay live state) — was undeployed -> /data served SPA HTML -> DataLoader fail-soft null -> degraded read-model. CORRECTION to #682: shipped as passthrough but the seed carries the operator-side 'aps-business-intake' top-level workspace key (empty, no customer content) which the tenant-isolation gate (R51-λ-2 APS_TOKENS) forbids in the operator bundle — every sibling operator file already strips the aps-* keys. strip_keys drops the aps top-level keys; the 21 operator workspaces remain. verify-tenant-bundle-isolation validates.
Operator identity fixture (generic) — was undeployed -> /data served SPA HTML -> DataLoader fail-soft null -> degraded read-model. 0 customer refs; boundary gate validates.
Notification events read-model (operator scope) — was undeployed -> /data served SPA HTML -> DataLoader fail-soft null -> degraded read-model. 0 customer refs; boundary gate validates.
Operator onboarding decision (generic) — was undeployed -> /data served SPA HTML -> DataLoader fail-soft null -> degraded read-model. 0 customer refs; boundary gate validates.
Production pilot-readiness read-model (Xlooop product readiness; no tenant data, 0 customer refs). Was undeployed -> SPA HTML -> DataLoader fail-soft null. Boundary gate validates.
Commercial controlled-pilot readiness read-model (Xlooop commercial stance/readiness ladder; no tenant data). Was undeployed -> SPA HTML -> DataLoader fail-soft null. Boundary gate validates.

Personal-home fixture (window.HOME; 0 APS tokens). Operator-only (28 operator-personal refs -> NOT in customer bundle). Was undeployed -> SPA HTML -> DataLoader fail-soft (default UserShellCockpit path unaffected; PersonalHome derefs guarded by router not mounting it).

Generic global template registry (window.DOMAIN_TEMPLATE_CATALOG; 0 APS tokens). Operator-only (carries operator owner_graph + template refs -> NOT customer-safe). Was undeployed -> 404 -> SPA HTML; consumers fail-soft (AccountScreens static BOARD_CATALOG fallback).
